documents.text: A lobster roll is a sandwich from New England made with lobster meat on a grilled split-top bun.
A tuna melt is a warm sandwich with cheese and tuna salad on toasted bread.
Maine lobster fisheries focus on sustainable harvest and coastal management.
Dinner rolls are small bread portions usually served as a side dish.

query: what is the incubation period of covid 19

documents.text: The incubation period for COVID-19 is usually between 2 and 14 days, with a median around 5 days.
COVID-19 vaccines reduce severe disease and hospitalization risk in most populations.
Coronaviruses are a family of viruses that can infect animals and humans.
Public health guidance includes masking, testing, and ventilation for respiratory outbreaks.
